name: plan-handoff
description: Save the latest proposed implementation plan into a repo-local handoff file and resume implementation from it in a fresh Codex session.

interface.shortDescription: Save the latest plan and continue it in a fresh Codex session
interface.longDescription: Use Plan Handoff to capture the latest proposed implementation plan from the current Codex session into a repo-local handoff file, then resume implementation from that saved plan in a fresh session without restoring the full conversation.
defaultPrompt: Save the latest proposed plan for a fresh-session handoff.
Resume implementation from the latest saved handoff.
Prepare or continue a repo-local plan handoff workflow.
